privileged_info_summary: The task explicitly defines the target Talon module directory as C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\git_voice and the Git repository path as C:\Users\Docker\Documents\test_repo, which match the metadata and verifier logic. However, the task is critically defective because the required hooks (setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1) are entirely missing from the environment, breaking the evaluation pipeline and making it impossible to successfully verify.
